plot outline: Jane Austen's beloved comedy about finding your equal and earning your happy ending, is reimagined in this. Handsome, clever, and rich, Emma Woodhouse is a restless queen bee without rivals in her sleepy little town. In this glittering satire of social class and the pain of growing up, Emma must adventure through misguided matches and romantic missteps to find the love that has been there all along.
title: Emma.
akas: Emma：上流貴族 (Hong Kong, English title)

other companies.name: Above the Line Set Assistance & Security
